creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry, the original subject should have read math/gotoblas-2.1.13_3
fails to build and not math/gotoblas-2.1.13_2.  math/gotoblas-2.1.13_2
is the version I currently have installed.  It's updating to
math/gotoblas-2.1.13_3 that fails.
